name: Green Beans and Glazed-Tomatoe Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the whole green beans in a small amount of boiling salted water until tender.
2. Melt butter in a skillet and stir in sugar and salt.
3. Add chopped tomatoes to the skillet and cook over low heat.
4. Stir frequently until the liquid has boiled down.
5. Drain the cooked beans and top with glazed tomatoes.
Tootie Notes: This "glazing" process leaves the tomatoes looking like they have little sparkles all over them.
